nodes.name: Yellow-billed lorikeet
nodes.summary: Yellow-billed lorikeet（Neopsittacus musschenbroekii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-billed lorikeet。

nodes.name: Yellow-billed lorikeet
nodes.summary: The yellow-billed lorikeet (Neopsittacus musschenbroekii) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. Description The yellow-billed lorikeet has green plumage with a red breast and a bright yellow bill. References
nodes.shortSummary: The yellow-billed lorikeet (Neopsittacus musschenbroekii) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is found in New Guinea.

nodes.name: Neopsittacus
nodes.summary: Neopsittacus（Neopsittacus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Yellow-billed lorikeet、Orange-billed lorikeet。
